# seerr_emby_settings (Resource)

Manage Seerr Emby settings via /api/v1/settings/emby.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) The API key for the Emby server.
- `ip` (String) The IP address or hostname of the Emby server.
- `port` (Number) The port of the Emby server.

### Optional

- `emby_forgot_password_url` (String) The URL for forgotten passwords on the Emby server.
- `external_hostname` (String) The external hostname for the Emby server.
- `name` (String) The name of the Emby server.
- `url_base` (String) The base URL for the Emby server.
- `use_ssl` (Boolean) Whether to use SSL for the connection.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response body from the latest operation.
- `server_id` (String) The unique server ID of the connected Emby server.
- `status_code` (Number) HTTP status code from the latest operation.
